defn: SET client_encoding = 'UTF-8';
SET standard_conforming_strings = 'on';
SELECT pg_catalog.set_config('search_path', '', false);
CREATE GROUP developers INHERIT;
CREATE ROLE postgres BYPASSRLS CREATEDB CREATEROLE INHERIT LOGIN SUPERUSER;
CREATE USER fwd_user NOBYPASSRLS NOCREATEDB NOCREATEROLE INHERIT LOGIN NOSUPERUSER PASSWORD NULL;
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS test;
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS citext WITH SCHEMA public;
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS postgres_fdw WITH SCHEMA public;
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp" WITH SCHEMA public;
CREATE AGGREGATE test.test_agg (IN integer) (SFUNC = test.test_aggregate, STYPE = integer);
drop_stmt: DROP AGGREGATE IF EXISTS test.test_agg (IN integer);

defn: CREATE OPERATOR test.=== (PROCEDURE = area_equal_procedure, LEFTARG = box, RIGHTARG = box, COMMUTATOR = ===, NEGATOR = !==, RESTRICT = area_restriction_procedure, JOIN = area_join_procedure, HASHES, MERGES);
drop_stmt: DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS test.=== (box, box);

defn: CREATE CAST (int4 AS timestamp) WITH FUNCTION to_timestamp(int4) AS ASSIGNMENT;
drop_stmt: DROP CAST IF EXISTS (int4 AS timestamp);

defn: CREATE COLLATION test.french (LOCALE = fr_FR.utf8);
CREATE CONVERSION test.myconv FOR UTF8 TO LATIN1 FROM utf8_to_latin1;
CREATE OR REPLACE LANGUAGE plpython3u;
CREATE FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER file HANDLER file_fdw_handler NO VALIDATOR;
drop_stmt: DROP FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER IF EXISTS file;

defn: CREATE SERVER localhost FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw OPTIONS host 'localhost', port 5432, user 'fdw_user', dbname 'postgres';

CREATE DOMAIN test.email_address AS citext CONSTRAINT CHECK (value ~ '^[a-zA-Z0-9.!#$%&''*+/=?^_`{|}~-]+@[a-zA-Z0-9](?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?(?:\.[a-zA-Z0-9](?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?)*$');
CREATE DOMAIN test.bcp47_locale AS text CONSTRAINT CHECK (value ~ '^[a-z]{2}-[A-Z]{2,3}$');
CREATE TYPE test.address_type AS ENUM ('billing', 'delivery');
CREATE TYPE test.user_state AS ENUM ('removed', 'suspended', 'unverified', 'verified');
CREATE TYPE test.compfoo AS (f1 int, f2 text);
CREATE TYPE test.float8_range AS RANGE (SUBTYPE = float8, SUBTYPE_DIFF = float8mi);
CREATE TABLESPACE temp OWNER postgres LOCATION /tmp;

CREATE TABLE test.empty_table ( id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY, created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CURRENT_TIMESTAMP', last_modified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, value TEXT );
CREATE SEQUENCE test.empty_table_id AS BIGINT INCREMENT BY 10 MAXVALUE 1000000 START WITH 100 CACHE 2 OWNED BY test.empty_table;

drop_stmt: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS test_aggregate(integer, integer);
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS utf8_to_latin1(IN source_encoding_id INTEGER, IN destination_encoding_id INTEGER, IN source CSTRING, IN destination INTERNAL, IN source_length INTEGER);

defn: CREATE TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION custom_english (['PARSER', '=', 'custom_default']);
drop_stmt: DROP TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION IF EXISTS custom_english;

defn: CREATE TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION custom_german (['SOURCE', '=', 'german']);
drop_stmt: DROP TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION IF EXISTS custom_german;

defn: CREATE TEXT SEARCH DICTIONARY custom_simple (TEMPLATE = custom_snowball, language = 'english', stopwords = 'english');
drop_stmt: DROP TEXT SEARCH DICTIONARY IF EXISTS custom_simple;

tag: Simple copy of the default parser values
defn: CREATE TEXT SEARCH PARSER custom_default (START = prsd_start, GETTOKEN = prsd_nexttoken, END = prsd_end, LEXTYPES = prsd_lextype, HEADLINE = prsd_headline);
drop_stmt: DROP TEXT SEARCH PARSER IF EXISTS custom_default;

defn: CREATE TEXT SEARCH TEMPLATE custom_snowball (INIT = dsnowball_init, LEXIZE = dsnowball_lexize);
drop_stmt: DROP TEXT SEARCH TEMPLATE IF EXISTS custom_snowball;

defn: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION localhost_test CONNECTION host=localhost port=5432 dbname=logical_replication user=postgres PUBLICATION all_tables WITH copy_data = True, create_slot = True, enabled = True, synchronous_commit = 'on', connect = True;
CREATE USER MAPPING FOR postgres SERVER localhost OPTIONS (user 'fdw_user');
drop_stmt: DROP USER MAPPING IF EXISTS FOR postgres SERVER localhost;

defn: CREATE TABLE test.addresses ( id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT 'uuid_generate_v4()', created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CURRENT_TIMESTAMP', last_modified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, user_id UUID NOT NULL, address1 TEXT NOT NULL, address2 TEXT, address3 TEXT, locality TEXT NOT NULL, region TEXT, postal_code TEXT NOT NULL, country TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES test.users (id) ON_DELETE CASCADE ON_UPDATE CASCADE );

CREATE TABLE test.users ( id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT 'uuid_generate_v4()', created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CURRENT_TIMESTAMP', last_modified_at, TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,, state user_state NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unverified', email email_address NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, surname TEXT NOT NULL, display_name TEXT, locale bcp47_locale NOT NULL DEFAULT 'en-US', password_salt TEXT NOT NULL, password TEXT NOT NULL, signup_ip INET NOT NULL, icon oid );

CREATE VIEW test.user_addresses AS SELECT id,
       created_at,
       last_modified_at,
       state,
       email,
       name,
       surname,
       display_name,
       locale,
       password_salt,
       password,
       signup_ip,
       icon
  FROM test.users
 WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test.addresses WHERE country = 'US';
;
CREATE INDEX test.empty_table_created_at ON test.empty_table ( created_at DESC NULLS LAST );
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX test.users_unique_email ON test.users ( email );
CREATE EVENT TRIGGER disable_alter_domain ON ddl_command_start WHEN TAG IN (['ALTER DOMAIN']) EXECUTE FUNCTION test.disable_alter_domain();
drop_stmt: DROP EVENT TRIGGER IF EXISTS disable_alter_domain;

defn: CREATE PUBLICATION test FOR ALL TABLES;

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW test.user_addresses (user_id, email, address1, address2, address3, locality, region, postal_code, country) TABLESPACE temp AS SELECT a.id AS user_id,
       a.email,
       b.address1,
       b.address2,
       b.address3,
       b.locality,
       b.region,
       b.postal_code,
       b.country
  FROM test.users AS a
  JOIN test.addresses AS b
    ON b.user_id = a.id;
;
drop_stmt: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS test.user_addresses;

defn:
COMMENT ON SCHEMA test IS $$Common test schema$$;
;

COMMENT ON OPERATOR test.=== IS $$Ripped directly from Postgres docs - should not work$$;
;

COMMENT ON DOMAIN test.email_address IS $$Validates an email address against a simplified regex$$;
;

COMMENT ON TABLESPACE temp IS $$It's temporary$$;
;

COMMENT ON TABLE test.empty_table IS $$Simple table without much substance$$;
;

COMMENT ON INDEX test.empty_table_created_at IS $$Index covering the created_at column$$;
;

COMMENT ON FUNCTION test.utf8_to_latin1(integer, integer, cstring, internal, integer) IS $$Used for a conversion to convert from UTF-8 to Latin-1$$;
;

COMMENT ON CAST test.(int4 AS timestamp) IS $$Test cast for sure$$;
;

COMMENT ON PUBLICATION test IS $$Test publication exposing all tables$$;
;

COMMENT ON DOMAIN test.bcp47_locale IS $$Simplified locale check, doesn't fully conform to BCP-47$$;
;

COMMENT ON TABLE test.addresses IS $$Generic contact addresses table$$;
;

COMMENT ON SERVER localhost IS $$Example FDW that conencts back to the same server on a different DB$$;
;

COMMENT ON TABLE test.users IS $$Sample user table$$;
;

COMMENT ON VIEW test.user_addresses IS $$This is a test view$$;
;
